message:
feat(runtime): extend runtime ACL CAT list with server + generic and tidy error text

Mirror the fr-command ACL_CATEGORIES update on the runtime side so
both code paths enumerate the same upstream-Redis category set, and
tighten the unknown-category error so it matches Redis's wording.

crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs:
- Add `"server"` and `"generic"` to the runtime's ACL categories
  array. Without these entries, `ACL CAT server` / `ACL CAT generic`
  and the associated `+@server` / `+@generic` rule expansion returned
  nothing, which diverged from both upstream Redis and the recently
  updated fr-command list.
- Adjust the unknown-category reply from `"ERR Unknown category
  '<cat>'"` to `"ERR Unknown ACL cat category '<cat>'"` so clients
  that match on Redis's precise error text (the conformance oracle
  included) no longer fail the string compare.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
